name: VEAZY Cooling Unit
summary: Enhance every session with the VEAZY Cooling Unit from Storz & Bickel.
description: Enhance every session with the VEAZY Cooling Unit from Storz & Bickel. Designed for optimal performance, this precision-engineered accessory cools and filters vapour for a smoother, cleaner inhale. Its integrated screen helps reduce residue buildup while maintaining consistent airflow and flavour purity. Ideal for replacing a worn part or keeping your setup ready for rotation, this genuine cooling unit keeps your VEAZY Vaporiser performing at its best. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
